content.speakerText: Do you have a package for me? It's from FedEx and my name is Lisa Chen.
content.speakerTextCn: 有我的快递吗？是FedEx寄来的，我的名字是Lisa Chen。
expectedAnswers: Let me check the system with your employee ID.
Hold on, I'll look up your name in the delivery log.
Yes, it's a brown envelope on the second shelf.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确识别并回应包裹查询请求
语言准确性：是否使用恰当动词搭配如 'check the system' 或 'look up your name'
表达自然度：是否使用职场常用语如 'Hold on', 'I'll look up', 避免生硬表达

content.scenarioHint: 你来到公司前台，想确认今天是否有寄给你的快递，但不确定具体是哪家快递公司。
content.speakerText: Hi, could you check if there's a package for me today?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，你能帮我查一下今天有没有我的快递吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi, could you check if there's a package for me today?
Do I have any deliveries waiting for me?
Is there anything for [Your Name] at the front desk?
Hey, any parcels arrived for me recently?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了询问快递的意图
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌自然
关键词覆盖：使用了 package/delivery/parcel 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你知道快递来自京东，且收件人是你的全名，想向前台确认是否已到。
content.speakerText: Hi, I’m expecting a package from JD.com under the name Li Wei. Has it arrived?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我等一个寄给李伟的京东快递，到了吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi, I’m expecting a package from JD.com under the name Li Wei. Has it arrived?
Could you check if there’s a JD delivery for Li Wei today?
Any packages from JD with my name — Li Wei — on them?
I’m Li Wei. Did a京东 package come in for me?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了寄件平台和收件人信息
语言准确性：正确使用了公司名、人名和时态
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 JD.com / package / name / arrived 等关键词
